## **DISCO Pharmaceuticals – Banker-Grade Debrief (JPM_STARTUP_BANKER)**

**Verdict: PASS** — Ready for outreach this week.

DISCO Pharmaceuticals (Cologne, Germany) just announced a **€36M seed round** (announced 2025-12-11, ~16 days old) led by Ackermans & van Haaren and NRW.Bank. {{fact:ground_truth:DISCO}} The company is building a **surfaceome mapping platform** to identify and validate novel targets for antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs)—a hot category in oncology. Lead programs are ADC candidates targeting SCLC (small cell lung cancer) and MSS-CRC (microsatellite-stable colorectal cancer).
